Package ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.task_1_2_2

Class Tree<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.task_1_2_2.Tree<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - Type of elements' values
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Iterable<T>, java.util.Collection<T>
    public class Tree<T>
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.util.Collection<T>
    Represents a tree type.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Tree()  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int add​(java.lang.Object parent, T o)
      Adds new child node to the node of the tree specified by its value and returns node's identifier.
      boolean add​(T o)  
      boolean addAll​(java.util.Collection<? extends T> c)  
      boolean addAll​(T obj, java.util.Collection<? extends T> c)
      Adds all the elements in the specified collection to a node of the tree specified by its identifier.
      boolean addAllById​(int id, java.util.Collection<? extends T> c)
      Adds all the elements in the specified collection to a node of the tree specified by its identifier.
      int addById​(int id, T o)
      Adds new child node to the node of the tree specified by id and returns node's identifier.
      int addWithId​(T o)
      Adds new node with the specified value to the tree and returns node's identifier.
      void clear()  
      boolean contains​(java.lang.Object o)  
      boolean containsAll​(java.util.Collection values)

      Returns the value of required node.
      int getId​(T value)
      Returns an identifier of the node specified by its value.
      boolean isEmpty()  
      java.util.Iterator<T> iterator()
      Returns a breadth-search Iterator over this tree.
      java.util.Iterator<T> iteratorBFS()
      Returns a breadth-search Iterator over this tree.
      java.util.Iterator<T> iteratorDFS()
      Returns a depth-search Iterator over this tree.
      boolean remove​(java.lang.Object o)  
      boolean removeAll​(java.util.Collection values)  
      int removeById​(int id)
      Removes node of the tree specified by its id and returns the node's identifier.
      int removeWithId​(java.lang.Object o)
      Removes a node of the tree specified by its value and returns the node's identifier.

      Sets a value of the node to the new one.
      void setById​(int id, T value)
      Sets a value of the node found by id to the new one.

      T[] toArray​(java.lang.Object[] a)

      Converts the tree to a list using breadth-search order.

      • setById

        public void setById​(int id,
                    T value)
        Sets a value of the node found by id to the new one.
        Parameters:
        id - Identifier of node to modify
        value - Value to which the node has to be modified

      • set

        public void set​(T nodeValue,
                T newValue)
        Sets a value of the node to the new one.
        Parameters:
        nodeValue - Node with specific value to modify
        newValue - Value to which the node has to be modified

        public int addById​(int id,
                   T o)
        Adds new child node to the node of the tree specified by id and returns node's identifier.
        Parameters:
        id - Identifier of the node to which children o should be added
        o - Object to add
        Returns:
        Identifier of a new node

               T o)

        o - Object to add
        Returns:
        Identifier of a new node

      • addAllById

        public boolean addAllById​(int id,
                          java.util.Collection<? extends T> c)
        Adds all the elements in the specified collection to a node of the tree specified by its identifier.
        Parameters:
        id - Identifier of a node to which children elements to add
        c - Collection with elements to add
        Returns:
        True if the tree changed as the result of call

        public boolean addAll​(T obj,
                      java.util.Collection<? extends T> c)

        c - Collection with elements to add
        Returns:
        True if the tree changed as the result of call
